Wiley Publishing, Inc.
Wiley Publishing, Inc. is the publisher of the book Facebook Advertising For Dummies, based in Hoboken, NJ.<SEP>Wiley Publishing, Inc. is the publisher of the book Facebook Advertising For Dummies, based in Hoboken, NJ.<SEP>Wiley Publishing, Inc. is the publisher of the book Facebook Advertising For Dummies, based in Hoboken, NJ.<SEP>Wiley Publishing, Inc. is the publisher of the book Facebook Advertising For Dummies, based in Hoboken, NJ.

Facebook Advertising For Dummies
"Facebook Advertising For Dummies" is a comprehensive guidebook published by Wiley Publishing, Inc., focusing on the intricacies of Facebook's advertising platform. Authored by Paul Dunay, Richard Krueger, and Joel Elad, the book offers detailed, step-by-step advice and real-world experiences to help readers master Facebook advertising. It covers a broad spectrum of topics crucial for effective advertising on the platform, including the creation of ad campaigns, precision ad targeting, optimizing landing pages, and testing and optimizing ads. The book is designed to enhance the marketing skills of its readers, enabling them to better engage with customers and sell products and services through Facebook.

The authors acknowledge the support of their families and the team at Wiley, including Amy Fandrei and Christopher Morris, who played significant roles in the book's development. Additionally, the book includes acknowledgments to numerous bloggers and Facebook's team for their contributions to the field of Facebook advertising. "Facebook Advertising For Dummies" is dedicated to advertisers navigating the significant changes in marketing history, emphasizing the use of Facebook as a platform for acquiring customers and selling products and services. The book is noted for its straightforward, step-by-step advice, making it a valuable resource for both novice and experienced advertisers looking to leverage Facebook's advertising capabilities.

Paul Dunay
Paul Dunay is an award-winning B2B marketing expert and author, best known for his significant contributions to the field of marketing and his authorship of books such as "Facebook Advertising For Dummies" and "Facebook Marketing For Dummies" published by Wiley. With over 20 years of experience, Dunay has specialized in generating demand and creating buzz for leading organizations across various sectors, including technology, consumer products, financial services, and professional services. He currently serves as the Global Managing Director of Services and Social Marketing for Avaya.

Dunay's innovative approach to integrated marketing has earned him numerous accolades. He was recognized as one of BtoB Magazine’s Top 25 B2B Marketers of the Year in 2009. Additionally, he won the DemandGen Award for Utilizing Marketing Automation to Fuel Corporate Growth in 2008. His excellence in marketing has also been acknowledged through multiple nominations and awards from the Information Technology Services Marketing Association (ITSMA), including being a five-time finalist in the Marketing Excellence Awards competition and a gold award winner in 2005.<SEP>Paul Dunay is one of the authors of the book Facebook Advertising For Dummies.<SEP>Paul Dunay is an award-winning B2B marketing expert with over 20 years of experience in generating demand and creating buzz for leading technology, consumer products, financial services, and professional services organizations. He is the Global Managing Director of Services and Social Marketing for Avaya and the author of Facebook Marketing For Dummies.<SEP>Paul Dunay is a marketing expert and author recognized among BtoB Magazine’s Top 25 BtoB Marketers of the Year in 2009.

Joel Elad
Joel Elad is an accomplished author and expert in online marketing, known for his significant contributions to literature on digital business and social media. He has authored several books, including "Facebook Advertising For Dummies," "LinkedIn For Dummies," "Starting an Online Business All-in-One For Dummies," and "Web Stores Do-It-Yourself For Dummies." With a total of six books on various online topics, Joel has established himself as a prominent figure in the field of digital marketing and entrepreneurship.

In addition to his writing career, Joel Elad is the head of Real Method Consulting, a company focused on educating people through various media such as training seminars, DVDs, and books. His educational background includes a Master’s Degree in Business from UC Irvine and a Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science and Engineering from UCLA. Joel has also contributed to renowned publications like Entrepreneur magazine and Smartbiz.com, and has shared his expertise as an educator at institutions like the University of California, Irvine. His work and contributions have made him a respected authority in the realm of online business and marketing.<SEP>Joel Elad is one of the authors of the book Facebook Advertising For Dummies.<SEP>Joel Elad is an author who has written six books on various online topics, including LinkedIn For Dummies, Starting an Online Business All-in-One Desk Reference For Dummies, and Web Stores Do-It-Yourself For Dummies. He is the head of Real Method Consulting.<SEP>Joel Elad is an author known for books like LinkedIn For Dummies and coauthoring Starting an Online Business All-in-One For Dummies.

Richard Krueger
Richard Krueger is a prominent figure in the field of social media marketing, particularly known for his expertise in leveraging Facebook for business growth. He is one of the authors of the book "Facebook Advertising For Dummies," which underscores his authority in the domain of social media marketing. Richard is frequently quoted as an expert on social media marketing, reflecting his deep knowledge and influence in the industry.

In addition to his authorship, Richard Krueger is the co-founder and CEO of AboutFace Digital, a social media marketing agency that specializes in using Facebook as a platform for acquiring customers, building brands, and driving sales. His entrepreneurial spirit is evident through his extensive experience in various fields such as business development, branding, public relations, technical product development, and business management. Richard's successful track record includes leading business strategies for companies in diverse sectors including social media, interactive entertainment, broadband infrastructure, content syndication, mobile entertainment, online gaming, and local search. This comprehensive background highlights his versatility and expertise as a serial entrepreneur.<SEP>Richard Krueger is one of the authors of the book Facebook Advertising For Dummies.<SEP>Richard Krueger is the co-founder and CEO of AboutFace Digital, a social media marketing agency focused on using Facebook for acquiring customers, building brands, and driving sales. He is recognized as a serial entrepreneur with extensive experience in business development, branding, public relations, technical product development, and business management.<SEP>Richard Krueger is a frequently quoted authority on social media marketing.

Facebook
Facebook is an online social network platform and company founded by Mark Zuckerberg, widely recognized as the most popular online social network on the planet. It is a significant focus of marketing strategies, particularly in the book "Facebook Advertising For Dummies" authored by Paul Dunay, Richard Krueger, and Joel Elad. This book provides comprehensive guidance on advertising on Facebook, highlighting its capabilities for businesses to reach specific audiences based on demographics, interests, and geographic areas. Facebook is becoming the preferred platform for marketers and advertisers to acquire new customers, interact with existing ones, and sell products and services. The platform has undergone various changes in its advertising features, which are detailed in the book. Facebook offers robust advertising services and is central to modern advertising and marketing strategies. It is celebrated for rewriting the rules of marketing and is a pivotal tool for businesses aiming to enhance their marketing strategies through targeted advertising.

Cost Per Impression
Cost Per Impression (CPM) is a pricing model where advertisers pay for every thousand times their ad is displayed, regardless of clicks.<SEP>Cost per impression is a pricing model in Facebook advertising where advertisers pay each time their ad is displayed.<SEP>Cost Per Impression (CPM) is a pricing model in Facebook advertising where advertisers pay for every thousand times their ad is displayed.<SEP>Cost Per Impression (CPM) is a pricing model where advertisers pay for every thousand times their ad is displayed.

Wiley
Wiley is a prominent publishing company known for its extensive involvement in producing and publishing educational and instructional books. Wiley is the publisher of the widely recognized "Facebook Advertising For Dummies," a book aimed at helping readers navigate the complexities of advertising on the Facebook platform. The company has a dedicated team of professionals who support authors throughout the writing and publishing process. Key team members involved in the production of these books include Amy Fandrei and Christopher Morris, among other editors and managers who play crucial roles in bringing these publications to market.

In addition to "Facebook Advertising For Dummies," Wiley has published several other books authored by notable writers such as Paul Dunay and Joel Elad. One such book is "Facebook Marketing For Dummies," which further underscores Wiley's commitment to providing comprehensive guides on social media marketing. Wiley is also the publisher behind the entire Dummies series, which is renowned for its user-friendly and accessible approach to a wide range of topics. This series includes various titles designed to simplify complex subjects for readers, making Wiley a trusted name in educational publishing.<SEP>Wiley is the publisher behind the book Facebook Advertising For Dummies.<SEP>Wiley is the publisher of the book, with a team including Amy Fandrei and Christopher Morris who supported the authors in writing and publishing the book.<SEP>Wiley is the publisher of the book Facebook Advertising For Dummies.

Amy Fandrei
Amy Fandrei is an Acquisitions Editor at Wiley who played a crucial role in the development and publication of the book "Facebook Advertising For Dummies." She initially reached out to the authors due to their insightful blogs and provided continuous support throughout the entire book writing and publishing process. Amy Fandrei was instrumental in bringing the book to market, showcasing her significant involvement in the project's success. Her role as an Acquisitions Editor highlights her expertise in identifying potential authors and guiding them through the complexities of the publishing process.

Christopher Morris
Christopher Morris is the Senior Project Editor at Wiley, where he played a pivotal role in the production and market release of the book "Facebook Advertising For Dummies." In his capacity, he was instrumental in ensuring that the book adhered to the established For Dummies standards, a series known for its distinctive approach to instructional content. Christopher Morris was also responsible for keeping the authors on track throughout the writing and editing process, ensuring that the project timeline and quality benchmarks were met. His contributions were crucial in conforming the book to the specific stylistic and structural guidelines that define the For Dummies series, thereby maintaining consistency and quality across the publication.

An ad campaign on Facebook involves creating and managing advertisements to reach specific audiences based on demographics and interests.<SEP>An Ad Campaign is a coordinated series of advertisements designed to achieve specific marketing goals.

Facebook Fans
Facebook fans are users who follow and engage with a business or brand's Facebook page.

Mobile Apps
Mobile apps developed by Dummies provide how-to information on various topics, accessible via smartphones and other mobile devices.<SEP>Mobile Apps developed by Dummies provide access to how-to information on various topics, including digital photography, certification, and more.<SEP>Mobile Apps developed by Dummies provide how-to information on various topics, accessible via smartphones.

Cheat Sheets
Cheat Sheets are quick reference guides provided by Dummies, including checklists, charts, and common instructions.<SEP>Cheat Sheets offered by Dummies.com include checklists, charts, common instructions, and other resources to help users quickly access key information.<SEP>Cheat Sheets are quick reference guides provided by Dummies, including checklists, charts, and common instructions.

Bloggers
Bloggers are individuals who provided information about changes in Facebook's advertising platform.<SEP>Bloggers are individuals who write about various topics, including changes in Facebook's advertising platform, and provide valuable information to users and marketers.<SEP>Bloggers are individuals who kept the authors informed about changes in Facebook's advertising platform.

The Marketing Excellence Awards is a competition by ITSMA in which Paul Dunay has been a five-time finalist and a 2005 gold award winner.

Ad Targeting
Ad Targeting is the process of directing advertisements to specific audiences based on demographics, interests, and other criteria.

Marketers And Advertisers
Marketers and advertisers are professionals who use platforms like Facebook to acquire new customers, interact with existing customers, and sell products and services.
